name: rpsC_consensus_Firmicutes
description: Conserved single-copy gene rpsC consensus for Firmicutes. 30S ribosomal protein S3 (~650 bp); conserved across Bacteria/Archaea. Used in PhyEco / CheckM-style genome-completeness panels and as 16S-orthogonal phylogenetic marker. Allow moderate-to-high mismatch within the group.
